resources.string: Software EQ that reshapes sound before it hits your Bluetooth earbuds — works with any earbud model.

Note: EQ applied here always affects audio from this app\'s own player. Some other apps (e.g. PowerAmp) can also be shaped system-wide, but most streaming apps (Spotify, YouTube Music) don\'t support this and must be equalized with their own in-app EQ if they have one.
